'''pohajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:oakless|oakless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-h-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oakless|oakless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pohajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pohajithi|pohajithi]] || [[word:pohajiji|pohajiji]] || [[word:pohajishi|pohajishi]] || [[word:pohajiki|pohajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pohajuthuthu|pohajuthuthu]] || [[word:pohajujuju|pohajujuju]] || [[word:pohajushushu|pohajushushu]] || [[word:pohajukuku|pohajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pohajuthu|pohajuthu]] || [[word:pohajuju|pohajuju]] || [[word:pohajushu|pohajushu]] || [[word:pohajuku|pohajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pohajufthuf|pohajufthuf]] || [[word:pohajufjuf|pohajufjuf]] || [[word:pohajufshuf|pohajufshuf]] || [[word:pohajufkuf|pohajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pohajethe|pohajethe]] || [[word:pohajeje|pohajeje]] || [[word:pohajeshe|pohajeshe]] || [[word:pohajeke|pohajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pohajothotho|pohajothotho]] || [[word:pohajojojo|pohajojojo]] || [[word:pohajoshosho|pohajoshosho]] || [[word:pohajokoko|pohajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pohajotho|pohajotho]] || [[word:pohajojo|pohajojo]] || [[word:pohajosho|pohajosho]] || [[word:pohajoko|pohajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pohajofthof|pohajofthof]] || [[word:pohajofjof|pohajofjof]] || [[word:pohajofshof|pohajofshof]] || [[word:pohajofkof|pohajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:pohajÃŸfthÃŸf|pohajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:pohajÃŸfjÃŸf|pohajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:pohajÃŸfshÃŸf|pohajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:pohajÃŸfkÃŸf|pohajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:pohajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|pohajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:pohajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|pohajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:pohajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|pohajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:pohajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|pohajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:pohajÃŸfthÃŸf|pohajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:pohajÃŸfjÃŸf|pohajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:pohajÃŸfshÃŸf|pohajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:pohajÃŸfkÃŸf|pohajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:pohajÃŸfthÃŸf|pohajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:pohajÃŸfjÃŸf|pohajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:pohajÃŸfshÃŸf|pohajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:pohajÃŸfkÃŸf|pohajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pohajÃḊthÃḊ|pohajÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:pohajÃḊjÃḊ|pohajÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:pohajÃḊshÃḊ|pohajÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:pohajÃḊkÃḊ|pohajÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pohajathatha|pohajathatha]] || [[word:pohajajaja|pohajajaja]] || [[word:pohajashasha|pohajashasha]] || [[word:pohajakaka|pohajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pohajatha|pohajatha]] || [[word:pohajaja|pohajaja]] || [[word:pohajasha|pohajasha]] || [[word:pohajaka|pohajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pohajafthaf|pohajafthaf]] || [[word:pohajafjaf|pohajafjaf]] || [[word:pohajafshaf|pohajafshaf]] || [[word:pohajafkaf|pohajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:pohajasha|pohajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:pohajshÃḋsha|pohajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pohajrosha|pohajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pohajmusha|pohajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:pohajyasha|pohajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopohajnkshÃḋsha|gopohajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopohajnkrosha|gopohajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopohajnkmusha|gopohajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopohajnkyasha|gopohajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:pohahajasha|pohahajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pohahajshÃḋsha|pohahajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pohahajrosha|pohahajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pohahajmusha|pohahajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pohahajyasha|pohahajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopohahajnkshÃḋsha|gopohahajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopohahajnkrosha|gopohahajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopohahajnkmusha|gopohahajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopohahajnkyasha|gopohahajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pehÃḊjasha|pehÃḊjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pehÃḊjshÃḋsha|pehÃḊjshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pehÃḊjrosha|pehÃḊjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pehÃḊjmusha|pehÃḊjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pehÃḊjyasha|pehÃḊjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopehÃḊjnkshÃḋsha|gopehÃḊjnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopehÃḊjnkrosha|gopehÃḊjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopehÃḊjnkmusha|gopehÃḊjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopehÃḊjnkyasha|gopehÃḊjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:pohfajasha|pohfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pohfajshÃḋsha|pohfajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pohfajrosha|pohfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pohfajmusha|pohfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pohfajyasha|pohfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopohfajnkshÃḋsha|gopohfajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopohfajnkrosha|gopohfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopohfajnkmusha|gopohfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopohfajnkyasha|gopohfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
